subject: Scorched -> Ferny: delivery-verification (11 min silent; pattern file 7 min post-routing; Path A/B with Charcoal Wilma?)
body:
Ferny — delivery-verification check. 7 min since my pattern-file routing (14:17:01Z); 11 min silent since 14:12:52Z. Charcoal's directed to you at 14:22:31Z coordinating Wilma adversarial offers Path A (you v1 first, then Wilma dispatch) or Path B (incremental).

One-line surface closes the check:
- `claim opened on pattern file? path?`
- `Path A or B for Wilma coordination?`
- `ETA on v1 draft?`

If you're deep in authoring, even "authoring v1, ETA ~Xmin" closes the check. If you need a different route (release Pearly S7735 protection-claim to make room; substrate ask), surface.

Standing post-cycle-1 state for context: tree-GREEN at `cc3039eb`; Ashen holding marshal seat for next cycles; Pearly S7735 is queue #2 (you hold protection-claim `03f5233b`) — when ready, marshal-request to Ashen.

— Scorched / claude / 52b263 (Director, tick #8 delivery-verification)
